title: Long Hun
titleNative: 龙魂
synonyms: Long Shen Wan Xiang: Long Hun
synopsis: For millennia, the ancient and mysterious dragon race has thrived on the Central Plains. However, the conflict between the Light Soul and Dark Soul of the Divine Realm has also drawn the dragons into the fray. The dragons are plunged into a brutal internal strife, even facing the threat of extinction. In this moment of despair, the long-absent Prince Ao Xue of the East Sea returns with great force, determined to save the dragons from their peril.

synonyms: Recycling Scrap in the Celestial Court

synopsis: In a modern martial arts world, Zhao Xin unexpectedly inherits the Celestial Realm's recycling station. This grants him not only the aid of numerous immortals but also the admiration of many beauties, ultimately leading him to the pinnacle of martial arts.

title: PSYЯEN
titleNative: PSYREN -サイレン-
synopsis: One day, high schooler Ageha Yoshina picks up a mysterious “red phone card” left behind in a public telephone booth. A few days later, his childhood friend and classmate, Sakurako Amamiya—who possessed the same card—suddenly vanishes without a trace. In search of her, Ageha finds himself drawn into the rumors surrounding a nationwide string of mysterious disappearances, said to be the work of a secret organization known only as “Psyren.” When he accesses the group, a deadly game begins—one that will change his fate forever. (Source: Official Site)

title: Uchi no Otouto-domo ga Sumimasen
titleNative: うちの弟どもがすみません
synopsis: The manga centers on high school student Ito Hazui. During her spring break at the end of her first year of high school, Ito's mother remarries, and Ito moves to live with her new family, becoming Ito Narita. Upon arriving at her new house, Ito is shocked to learn she now has four younger step-brothers. Ito tries her hardest to get along with all of the new members of her family, but the eldest brother Gen is a bit cold to her. However, under his aloof facade, he occasionally shows his kindness. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Kyoufu Collector
titleNative: 恐怖コレクター
synopsis: Urban legends come to life…Everyone’s heard an urban legend before, but few have ever come face-to-face with one. These phenomena are everywhere, existing in the shadows of reality. More and more of them have been appearing in the wake of the faceless kid sighted all over Japan. If you see her or one of the urban legends she brings―pray the boy in the red hood finds you before it’s too late. You won’t stand a chance on your own. But with his help, you may just live to see another day… (Source: Yen Press)

title: CARDFIGHT!! VANGUARD Divinez Parallactic Clash
titleNative: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード Divinez 幻真星戦編
synopsis: The fifth season of Cardfight!! Vanguard: Divinez. Akina and his friends, having strayed into the Fantasma, find their path blocked by "Fantôme Fighters". The only ones who can stand against them are the special "Mythisch Fighters" chosen by the cards. What is a Fantôme Fighter— The collective name for those who confront reality and fight to protect the fabricated. What is a Mythisch Fighter— The collective name for those who withstand the Fantôme and fight to protect the real. Will the parallactic be erased, or will it become the verity? —Stand up and fight with your existence on the line. (Source: cf-vanguard.com)

tags.name: Card Battle
tags.description: Centers around individuals competing in card games.

title: Hoppe-chan: Sun Oukoku to Kuro Hoppe-dan no Himitsu
titleRomaji: Hoppe-chan: Sun Oukoku to Kuro Hoppe-dan no Himitsu
titleNative: ほっぺちゃん ～サン王国と黒ほっぺ団の秘密～
synonyms: HOPPECHAN - Mystery of the Sun Kingdom and the Black-Cheek Team -
synopsis: The anime's story is set in a world made of "cuteness" called Sun Kingdom. Ganso Hoppe-chan, who lost her memory, appears in the kingdom. Meanwhile, in the real world, an office worker named Hoho is slowly losing her self-esteem in her work and life, sending her on the verge of becoming lost in life. Somewhere between Ganso Hoppe-chan and Hoho's worlds, their paths cross. Back in Sun Kingdom, toxic Hoppe-chan creatures are creating an "uncute place," and Ganso Hoppe-chan joins the "Guardians" to protect the kingdom. (Source: ANN)
